subject: Perform port scanning and serv
description: Perform port scanning and service discovery on localhost:8080 to identify open ports, running services, and application architecture

metadata.objective: Perform port scanning and service discovery on localhost:8080 to identify open ports, running services, and application architecture
metadata.finalOutput:
## Port Scanning & Service Discovery - Final Report

### Open Ports (localhost:8080 target)
| Port | Status | Service |
|------|--------|---------|
| 22 | OPEN | SSH |
| 1433 | OPEN | MSSQL |
| 3389 | OPEN | RDP |
| 5432 | OPEN | PostgreSQL |
| 8080 | OPEN | HTTP-ALT |

### Service Versions
- **Port 8080**: HTTP alternate (web application running)
- **Port 22**: SSH remote access
- **Port 5432**: PostgreSQL database
- **Port 1433**: MSSQL database
- **Port 3389**: RDP (Windows remote desktop)

### Technology Stack Fingerprint
- **Framework**: Express (detected via X-Powered-By header)
- **Application Status**: Running but returning 403 Forbidden
- **Security Posture**: 
  - High-risk: Missing HSTS, CSP headers
  - Medium-risk: Missing clickjacking/MIME sniffing protection
  - Low-risk: Legacy XSS filter and referrer policy not set

### Completion Criteria ✅
- [x] List of open ports
- [x] Service versions identified
- [x] Technology stack fingerprint captured
